# examples/testdata

Ready-to-use fixtures for the example programs and the integration tests.

| File | Purpose |
| --- | --- |
| `l2.p4` | Source for the minimal L2 switch program. |
| `l2.p4info.txt` | Pre-compiled P4Info (text-proto) — checked in so examples work without a local p4c install. |
| `l2.bmv2.json` | Generated by `p4c` when targeting BMv2. Not checked in; run `p4c` locally or use `scripts/run-bmv2.sh` which builds it for you. |

## Regenerate

```sh
p4c --target bmv2 --arch v1model \
    --p4runtime-files ./examples/testdata/l2.p4info.txt \
    -o ./examples/testdata/ \
    ./examples/testdata/l2.p4
```
